info.name: Finance Dashboard Backend API
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for the Finance Dashboard Backend — Node.js + Express + MongoDB + JWT.

## Setup
1. Set `base_url` variable to `http://localhost:5000`
2. Run **Register** or **Login** — the token is auto-saved to `auth_token`
3. All protected routes use `{{auth_token}}` automatically

## Roles
- **viewer** — read-only access to transactions and dashboard summary
- **analyst** — viewer + category breakdown and monthly trends
- **admin** — full access including user management and transaction write operations

## Variables
| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `base_url` | API base URL (default: http://localhost:5000) |
| `auth_token` | Auto-set after login/register |
| `transaction_id` | Auto-set after creating a transaction |
| `user_id` | Auto-set after creating a user |

item.description: Authentication routes — register, login, profile, and password management.

item.name: Users

query.description: Filter by role: viewer | analyst | admin

request.description:
Returns a paginated list of all users.

**Requires:** Admin role

**Query Params:**
- `role` — filter by viewer | analyst | admin
- `isActive` — filter by true | false
- `page` — page number (default 1)
- `limit` — results per page (default 10, max 50)

originalRequest.description:

- `limit` — results per page (default 10, max 50)

request.description:
Update a user's name, role, or isActive status.

**Requires:** Admin role

**Cannot:** update email or password (rejected at validation layer)
**Cannot:** modify your own account via this route (blockSelfAction)
**Cannot:** demote/deactivate the last active admin (guardLastAdmin)

item.description:
User management routes — Admin access only.

All endpoints in this group require an Admin JWT token.

item.name: Transactions

request.description:
Returns paginated list of all non-deleted transactions.

**Requires:** Any authenticated role

**Filters (enable in Params tab):**
- `type` — income | expense
- `category` — salary | freelance | food | transport | utilities | health | entertainment | education | investment | other
- `startDate` / `endDate` — ISO 8601 date range
- `sortBy` / `order` — custom sort

response.name: 200 — Transaction List

originalRequest.description:
Returns paginated list of all non-deleted transactions.

**Requires:** Any authenticated role

**Filters (enable in Params tab):**
- `type` — income | expense
- `category` — salary | freelance | food | transport | utilities | health | entertainment | education | investment | other
- `startDate` / `endDate` — ISO 8601 date range
- `sortBy` / `order` — custom sort

request.description:
Fetch a single transaction by ID.

**Requires:** Any authenticated role

Soft-deleted transactions return 404.

response.name: 200 — Transaction Found

originalRequest.description:
Fetch a single transaction by ID.

**Requires:** Any authenticated role

Soft-deleted transactions return 404.

Fetch a single transaction by ID.

**Requires:** Any authenticated role

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Freelance Project Payment",
  "amount": 15000,
  "type": "income",
  "category": "freelance",
  "date": "2024-04-01",
  "notes": "React dashboard project for client"
}

request.description:
Create a new financial transaction.

**Requires:** Admin role

`createdBy` is set automatically from the JWT token — cannot be overridden.

**Auto-saves** the new transaction's ID to `transaction_id`.

**Valid categories:** salary | freelance | investment | food | transport | utilities | health | entertainment | education | other

response.name: 201 — Transaction Created

body.raw:

  "title": "Freelance Project Payment",
  "amount": 15000,
  "type": "income",
  "category": "freelance",
  "date": "2024-04-01",
  "notes": "React dashboard project for client"
}

originalRequest.description:

response.body:
{
  "message": "Transaction created successfully",
  "transaction": {
    "_id": "6633f9a1c3b4a12e9f000010",
    "title": "Freelance Project Payment",
    "amount": 15000,
    "type": "income",
    "category": "freelance",
    "date": "2024-04-01T00:00:00.000Z",
    "notes": "React dashboard project for client",
    "createdBy": "6633f8d2c3b4a12e9f000001",
    "isDeleted": false,
    "createdAt": "2024-04-01T10:30:00.000Z"
  }
}

request.description:
Partially update a transaction. Only include fields you want to change.

**Requires:** Admin role

All body fields are optional. At least one must be provided.
Soft-deleted transactions cannot be updated (returns 404).

response.name: 200 — Transaction Updated

Soft-deleted transactions cannot be updated (returns 404).

request.description:
Soft-deletes a transaction (sets isDeleted to true).

**Requires:** Admin role

The record is retained in the database but excluded from all GET endpoints and dashboard aggregations.
Already-deleted records return 404.

item.description:
Financial record management.

- **All authenticated roles** can read transactions
- **Admin only** can create, update, or delete
- Soft delete is used — records are never permanently removed

item.name: Dashboard

request.description:
Returns total income, total expenses, transaction counts, averages, and net balance.

**Requires:** Any authenticated role

Computed via MongoDB `$group` aggregation — no in-app arithmetic.
Date range filters apply to the transaction event date, not createdAt.

originalRequest.description:
Returns total income, total expenses, transaction counts, averages, and net balance.

**Requires:** Any authenticated role

Computed via MongoDB `$group` aggregation — no in-app arithmetic.
Date range filters apply to the transaction event date, not createdAt.

request.description:
Returns the N most recently added transactions.

**Requires:** Any authenticated role

Sorted by `createdAt` descending — shows recently-added records, not recently-dated ones.
limit is server-capped at 20.

originalRequest.description:
Returns the N most recently added transactions.

**Requires:** Any authenticated role

Sorted by `createdAt` descending — shows recently-added records, not recently-dated ones.
limit is server-capped at 20.

request.description:
Returns income and expense totals grouped by category.

**Requires:** Analyst or Admin role

Viewer gets 403.

Results sorted by total descending. Each group includes total, count, average, max, and min.

originalRequest.description:
Returns income and expense totals grouped by category.

**Requires:** Analyst or Admin role

Viewer gets 403.

Results sorted by total descending. Each group includes total, count, average, max, and min.

response.name: 403 — Viewer Denied

originalRequest.description:
Returns income and expense totals grouped by category.

**Requires:** Analyst or Admin role

Viewer gets 403.

Results sorted by total descending. Each group includes total, count, average, max, and min.

request.description:
Returns month-by-month income vs expense breakdown for a full year.

**Requires:** Analyst or Admin role

Viewer gets 403.

Always returns all 12 months — empty months show zeros. Critical for consistent frontend chart rendering.

item.description:
Analytics and summary endpoints powered by MongoDB aggregation pipelines.

- **All authenticated roles** — summary and recent feed
- **Analyst + Admin only** — category breakdown and monthly trends

item.name: RBAC Test Suite

request.description:
Login as viewer first, save token, then run this.
Expected: 200 OK

Login as viewer first, save token, then run this.
Expected: 403 Forbidden

Login as viewer first, save token, then run this.
Expected: 403 Forbidden

Login as analyst first, save token, then run this.
Expected: 200 OK

Login as analyst first, save token, then run this.
Expected: 403 Forbidden

Login as admin, then set the path to your own user ID.
Expected: 403 — blockSelfAction guard

Uses a hardcoded invalid token.
Expected: 401 — Invalid or expired token

item.description:
Pre-built test scenarios to verify role-based access control.

Run these in order after setting up your three test users (viewer, analyst, admin).

Change the `auth_token` variable to switch between roles.
